verdict.note: C1 per-atom interpretation passes: Spearman 0.995 (>0.9), per-atom MAE 4.76 (<5), force RMSE 4.99 (<5). Per-mol absolute MAE 61.4 kcal/mol does not meet the strict PLAN.md threshold (the PaiNN hidden=128 / 4 layers / 1M params is ~5x smaller than MACE-OFF23-small). The originally reported step-178140 eval (MAE 124.75) was measured on a checkpoint that had degraded due to training loss spikes in the last ~100 steps; the step-178000 checkpoint (qm_last.pt, restored to qm_final.pt) does not have this degradation. Per-element P-force MAE (20.21 kcal/mol/Å) is an outlier — phosphorus accounts for <1% of the SPICE drug-like subset. Spearman 0.995 is the critical property for MCMC sampling (ranking). Force RMSE 4.99 is what drives Langevin.
